runs.note: Migrated from OAuth implicit flow to authorization code flow with PKCE. Changed response_type from 'token' to 'code', implemented PKCE with S256 method, added state parameter for CSRF protection, and switched from localStorage to secure in-memory token storage. All existing function exports maintained for backward compatibility.
